expectations.text: Re-engagement flow that acknowledges the silence and offers a reason to return
expectations.evidence: Email 1 opens acknowledging 'It's been a couple of months since you last logged into [Product name]' and Email 2 provides new features as a concrete reason to return.

expectations.text: Makes both staying and leaving easy
expectations.evidence: Email 4 offers 'you can [cancel / pause / keep your account at no cost — whatever applies]' making leaving easy, while also providing a login CTA.

expectations.text: Ends with suppression/removal of non-responders to protect deliverability
expectations.evidence: Post-sequence action explicitly states 'No response after Email 4: Remove from active marketing sends. Keep in a suppressed segment.'
The response notes Email 1's tone as 'Short, human, no pressure,' and Email 4 commits to this being 'the last email I'll send about coming back to [Product name].'
